message:
✨ Add Favorites tab and fix TMDB-only discovery (#19)

- Repository now falls back to TMDB trending/popular/search when Trakt
  is not configured (was returning empty lists)
- TmdbSearchResult: add backdropPath, year, releaseDate, firstAirDate
- New FavoritesNotifier persists favorites as JSON in SharedPreferences
- Favorites tab is now the default (index 0) on Shows & Movies screen
- Heart icon overlay on every poster card to toggle favorites
- Empty favorites state with helpful guidance text

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
